sourceMovie.title: Bambi: The Reckoning
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Bambi: The Reckoning works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Bambi: The Reckoning clicked for you, Wrong Turn (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Bambi: The Reckoning?
faq.answer: Try Wrong Turn, The Last House on the Left, Godzilla—each shares DNA with Bambi: The Reckoning while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Bambi: The Reckoning?
faq.answer: Bambi: The Reckoning (2025) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Bambi: The Reckoning worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
